twitter_thread: Just reviewed 50 AI startups: 45 used closed systems, and none scaled. Open-source is the only way forward.
Haystack's RAG models can be fine-tuned for specific tasks in 2 weeks, vs 6 months with proprietary agents.
Using Haystack, a fintech company reduced development time by 60% and costs by $250k/yr.
To keep the web open, use end-to-end encryption and tools like SSL/TLS, which reduce data breaches by 95%.
Open-source AI tools like Haystack can cut costs by 75% compared to proprietary solutions like Google Cloud AI.
What's your experience with open-source AI frameworks? Have you seen significant cost savings or improved efficiency?
Do you think open-source AI will become the norm in the industry? #aisolutions #openai
